info.title: PAIMOS API
info.description:
PAIMOS — Professional & Personal AI Project OS.

This is the **public, stable scriptable contract** for PAIMOS — the canonical resource surface used by the SPA, the paimos CLI, and custom integrations: auth, users, projects, issues, comments, time entries, attachments, documents, incidents, knowledge, and GDPR ops. It is intentionally a curated subset. Internal one-off admin tooling (CSV/Jira/mite imports, dev test reports, branding writes, SSO/TOTP management, AI operations, portal internals) is deliberately omitted and is NOT part of the stability contract — those endpoints exist but may change without notice. Authentication is either a session cookie (browser) or a `paimos_*` bearer API key (machine-to-machine). Coverage policy & contribution rule: PAI-294.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Login, session, password reset, TOTP, profile

tags.name: knowledge
tags.description: Unified knowledge plane (memory, runbook, guideline, external-system, related-project)

sessionCookie.name: session
sessionCookie.description: Issued by POST /api/auth/login. Browser SPA. CSRF-protected via X-CSRF-Token header for mutations (PAI-113).

bearerAPIKey.description: Long-lived API key, prefix configurable via BRAND_API_KEY_PREFIX. Created via /api/auth/api-keys.

MutationChangeEvent.description: Metadata-only mutation event emitted by GET /api/changes. Snapshot fields such as before_state, after_state, and inverse_op are intentionally omitted.

KnowledgeEntry.description: PAI-394 unified knowledge entry shape. `type` is the SQL discriminator (snake_case). Returned by every read on /api/projects/{id}/knowledge.

status.description: Issue status enum value (typically backlog / proposed / cancelled)

metadata.description: Per-type tail fields (schemaless on the server; per-Module validation runs on write)

reference_count.description: PAI-347 decay counter (memory only; 0 for other types)

KnowledgeEntryInput.description: Write shape for POST / PUT on the unified knowledge surface. `type` is required on POST (either kebab URL segment or snake_case discriminator); on PUT, the URL pins the type and a body type must match.

status.description: Optional; defaults to the type's DefaultStatus

search_scope_shortcut.description: JSON {ctrl,shift,alt,meta,code,key,label} or empty string when disabled. Must include Ctrl/Alt/Meta when set.

ai_work_status.description: Latest Implement-this agent run state for this issue, when any run exists

NotFound.description: Resource not found, or hidden from caller for privacy

version.description: App version (semver) stamped at build time, or 'dev' for local builds.

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream for live list freshness. Requires PAIMOS_LIVE_UPDATES_ENABLED=true. Emits `mutation` events whose `data` is a MutationChangeEvent JSON object; heartbeat comments keep idle connections alive.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Replay mutation_log events with an id greater than this value before streaming live events.

200.description: SSE stream of mutation metadata events

503.description: Too many concurrent live update streams

get.summary: Current authenticated user + project access summary

patch.summary: Update current user's profile and preferences

post.summary: Begin password reset (always returns 202 to prevent enumeration)

parameters.name: ai_status
parameters.description: Comma-separated latest AI run statuses to include. Prefix a value with ! to exclude it. Use none to match issues with no AI run.

get.summary: List or look up issues across projects

parameters.name: ai_status
parameters.description: Comma-separated latest AI run statuses to include. Prefix a value with ! to exclude it. Use none to match issues with no AI run.

post.summary: Start a time entry on issue

get.summary: Export incidents (admin) — JSON or CSV for SIEM ingestion
List knowledge entries (all types or filtered)
get.description: PAI-394 unified surface. Without `type`, returns every non-trashed knowledge entry across all five registered types. With `type=<segment>`, narrows to that type. Segments are kebab-singular: memory, runbook, guideline, external-system, related-project.

post.description: Type travels either in the body (`type` field, kebab segment or snake_case discriminator) or as a `?type=` query parameter — body wins on conflict.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Convenience: matches body.type when both are present

400.description: Invalid type, slug, or per-type metadata

409.description: Slug already exists for this type in this project

put.summary: Replace a knowledge entry (rename via body.slug)

409.description: Slug rename collides with an existing entry of the same type

post.summary: Bump reference counters for memory entries (PAI-347)

get.summary: Stale bot-proposed memory drafts pending admin review (PAI-349)

post.summary: Create an agent run ("Implement this"). Project-editor gated.

action_key.description: Requested provider action, e.g. claude_cli.implement or codex_cli.implement. Omitted defaults to the legacy Claude local CLI action.

get.summary: List a ticket's agent runs (newest first)
Fetch an agent run. Requester, project editor, or admin.

patch.summary: Update an agent run — status transitions + structured report. Requester, claimer, or admin.

if_status.description: optimistic claim guard — apply only if the run is still in this status

device_id.description: actual runner device id; accepted only when claiming a queued run

action_key.description: requested action key; when present it must match the run's original action

409.description: Claim lost (if_status mismatch) or a transition out of a terminal status was rejected

get.summary: List a project's agent runs (runner catch-up). Optional ?status= filter.
List online, implement-capable runners for a project (device picker)
